about.title: JSConf JP 2026
about.description: jsconf.jp is a JavaScript festival in Japan powered by Japan Node.js Association. This is the seventh time event of jsconf in Japan. We would love to become a bridge between Japanese Web Developers and International Web Developers.

venue.address: Sumitomo Fudosan Kanda Bldg. 2F-3F, 7 Kanda-Mitoshirocho, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo 101-0053
venue.accessByTrainDescription:
* Ogawamachi Sta. Exit B6, 2 min walk (Toei Shinjuku Line)
* Shin-Ochanomizu Sta. Exit B6, 2 min walk (Chiyoda Line)
* Awajicho Sta. Exit B6, 2 min walk (Marunouchi Line)
* Kanda Sta. Exit 5, 6 min walk (Ginza Line)
* Kanda Sta. West Exit, 7 min walk (JR)
* Otemachi Sta. Exit C2b, 7 min walk (Hanzomon / Marunouchi / Tozai / Mita / Chiyoda Lines)
venue.accessFromAirportDescription:
* Haneda Airport → Toei Subway Sample Line "Sample Station" exit 5 minutes walk
* Narita Airport → Toei Subway Sample Line "Sample Station" exit 5 minutes walk
